name: Chikn Nuggit RPG
description:
Listen. This is one of my favorite shorts series ever created and my comfort zone. And frankly, who wouldn’t want to live in this world? I CAN’T BE THE ONLY ONE!

Well, if you’re on the same bandwagon, this RPG should be able to satisfy!

Update: November 19th:

I rewrote the first message. I’ll still keep the old one as an alternate beginning if people liked it.
creator: SacredSean
